issue.body:

`Bypass Paywalls Clean filter (url: https://gitflic.ru/project/magnolia1234/bypass-paywalls-clean-filters/blob/raw?file=bpc-paywall-filter.txt)` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,

**Miscellaneous**:
